<?php /** * Concrete comment token class. Generally will be ignored. */ class HTMLPurifier_Token_Comment extends HTMLPurifier_Token { /** * Character data within comment. * @type string */ public $data; /** * @type bool */ public $is_whitespace = true; /** * Transparent constructor. * * @param string $data String comment data. * @param int $line * @param int $col */ public function __construct($data, $line = null, $col = null) { $this->data = $data; $this->line = $line; $this->col = $col; } public function toNode() { return new HTMLPurifier_Node_Comment($this->data, $this->line, $this->col); } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
